commit.subject: LU-13230 tests: reproduce test fsx hang
commit.message:
LU-13230 tests: reproduce test fsx hang

We need to understand how often we see sanity-benchmark
test fsx hangs on the Lustre b2_12 branch.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=zfs envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes clientdistro=el7.7 serverdistro=el7.7 clientcount=2 osscount=1 ostcount=7 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 testlist=sanity-benchmark
Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=zfs envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes clientdistro=el7.7 serverdistro=el7.7 clientcount=2 osscount=1 ostcount=7 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 testlist=sanity-benchmark
